entry.summary:
Author: 444peepeepoopoo666

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,232Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 5

Summary: Lily Walker tries to solve her mother's death and discovers the Court of Owls and an old legend about the Dark Witch.

entry.title: The Odd Tea Shop in Crime Alley
entry.summary:
Author: nocteris

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,527Chapters: 6/25Kudos: 194

Summary: Across the street from Jason’s apartment in Park Row, a budding sign of hope caught his eye. A simple signage: Opening Soon! Tea Brews and Books. Only, he almost fistfights the snarky tea shop owner at a book sale. Then, rescues her from a mugger or three as Red Hood. Uncoincidentally, his family gets interested in the tea shop and plagues Jason with their existence both mask-on and mask-off. Coincidentally, said tea shop owner has the biggest crush on Red Hood. Now, how the hell was Jason supposed to compete with himself?

entry.title: You've Got Mail - J.Todd/Reader
entry.summary:
Author: liasnotepad

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,529Chapters: 13/?Kudos: 30

Summary: You work at a bookstore, and your boss is an addicted. Red Hood saves you a couple of times, and finally gives in to giving you his...email (?).Meanwhile, a new bookstore is being build right next to yours. Inspired by the You've Got Mail movie.

entry.title: People Aren't Good
entry.summary:
Author: Miss_nightshade

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 49,107Chapters: 15/?Kudos: 126

Summary: Hecate has spent her life tucked into the bruised edges of Gotham’s Narrows, pretending to be a small, harmless girl with nothing worth noticing. It’s a fragile lie, but it holds. She goes to school. She walks home alone. She returns to a house that feels older than she is, a place that hums with magic she refuses to touch. She keeps her power buried. She ignores the ancient voices whispering inside her. She does everything she can to stay unseen. And for years, it works. Until the night it doesn’t.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: COLOR ME, YOU
entry.summary:
Author: reveriery

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,016Chapters: 3/5Kudos: 32

Summary: "Can you cosplay as Red Hood for me, pretty please?"How does a minor crush on the hot guy at the library lead you to ask Jason Todd to be your muse. A story about how hope when given, returns to you when you least expect it. cross posted on tumblr @luviery

entry.title: Baby bump
entry.summary:
Author: Kandyscorner

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,062Chapters: 6/6Kudos: 679

Summary: requested on tumblr:okay so the reader finding out she’s pregnant with Jason’s baby but doesn’t want to tell him because she’s scared of his reaction and tries to leave without telling him but he finds out anyway? (could it be angst to fluff and include the batfamily?) More has been added. Girl Dad! Jason Todd to follow.

entry.title: Still Him, Somehow
entry.summary:
Author: Oxylli

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,335Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 5

Summary: Losing her childhood best friend was the worst thing that was ever to happen to Melia, she thinks, running a simple life full of trouble and piles of books to run away from her lonely past and move on from Jason. Just as life starts making sense again, the new and most annnoying red-headed vigilante decides to take his claim over the streets of Gotham. To say she hates him is an understatement. Unbeknownst to her, the new vigilante is exactly the person she's needed for all these years she had lost him. Him on the other hand is hellbent on making sure she never finds out how far the two of them actually go back. Unfortunately for both of them, the universe decides its been long enough that they've been apart, and does everything in its power to force them back together.

entry.title: The Way You See Me
entry.summary:
Author: Xivkyn

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 23,707Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 84

Summary: After being an experiment to Hugo Strange for the majority of your life you finally escape. The trauma of your time there follows you as you remember the screams and death all around you. You don't even know your own name as the number 'Seven' was the only semblance of a name you were given. You have no one to go home to and nothing you look forward to except for revenge. It consumes your every thought ever since you escaped. You want him to feel the pain he caused you and your friends.Limited y/n usage

entry.title: OMNISCIENT
entry.summary:
Author: jennysketchup

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 51,755Chapters: 12/50Kudos: 160

Summary: Death and Destiny are star-crossed lovers; they're bound for eternity but are subject to Fate and her imposing presence. entry.title: Fragments
entry.summary:
Author: TheOneCaughtInTheStorm

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,119Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 19

Summary: You’re just trying to survive your shift in a rundown bakery with your cleaning job in the worst part of Gotham city when you end up with a half-dead stranger who has zero memory, questionable instincts and the emotional regulation of a brick wall. In a city that feels permanently out of luck and running on unadulterated hatred and poor decisions, you’re barely keeping your own life from falling apart. So naturally, you do the one thing that makes no sense at all.You take him in.

entry.title: Hangman's Trick // J. Todd
entry.summary:
Author: themoonunderstandsmyneeds

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 39,799Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 53

Summary: They were the best of friends, the girl and the boy from the slums. Hunched over books together in the library, vicious games of uno, movies and popcorn on the couch, tending to each other's scrapes and cuts, sleepovers, nights on the rooftops of Gotham, two children playing at being heroes. They never knew what awaited them, the horrors and traumas that were just a breath away. They haven't seen each other in over seven years, he's supposed to be dead, she's supposed to have moved on. But, nothing is the way it's supposed to be.   ( A/N: not the best summary but you get the point lol. don't expect this to be a comic accurate story. i will do my best to keep characters how they are represented in their media but i'm not holding myself to any particular story line. consider this an AU if you will. please check TW's. i will put chapter specific ones in the notes at the start of every chapter but for the first chapter i will try and cover all the potential triggers this story will cover. anyways, essentially this is a story where you are jason's childhood best friend, who isn't aware that he is alive. don't expect everything to make perfect sense, we will gain more backstory as we progress. enjoy xx.)
